texto: He wanted one night with her when he did not have to be on his guard waiting for the Douglases to discover that she was English and a lass
autor: one night when he could sit and talk with her by the fire without another soul in sight
explicacao: Orientação direta de one night when he could sit and talk with her by the fire without another soul in sight sobre temas ligados a motivacao. A afirmação “He wanted one night with her when he did not have to be on his guard waiting for the Douglases to…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao, útil em momentos de boa-noite e inspiracao.
